# Joel M Turner

> Senior Product Engineer in Portland. Astro/React/TypeScript blog, dev tips (TIL), illustration & zines, and side projects.

Joel M Turner is a Senior Product Engineer at [Homeworks](https://home.works) in Portland, Oregon, with a background in graphic design and web development. This site is his portfolio, technical writing archive, and work log: engineering tutorials and TILs, open-source side projects, and creative work (hand lettering, illustration, zines, and process videos). Previously Lead Product Engineer (Frontend) at [Sprinklr](https://sprinklr.com), where he worked on visualization products.

## Skills

- Product engineering: TypeScript, React, React Native, TanStack Query, Next.js
- This site and Jamstack: Astro 6, MDX, Tailwind CSS 4, Cloudinary, Netlify
- Data visualization and charting (Sprinklr-era products; Chart Parts, vx/Recharts)
- Accessibility, performance, and static hosting (fonts, Core Web Vitals)
- Creative tech: hand lettering, illustration, zines, vanilla web components

## Notable work

### Career and impact

- [Homeworks](https://home.works): Senior Product Engineer — building the new product experience and contributing to legacy systems
- [Sprinklr](https://sprinklr.com): Lead Product Engineer (Frontend) — visualization products
- World Health Organization Covid-19 Dashboard (Sprinklr)
- Covid HQ Africa Dashboard (Sprinklr)
- [Sprinklr Display](https://www.sprinklr.com/products/platform/display/): digital signage and display platform

### Side projects

- [Instagram To Cloudinary](https://joelmturner.com/blog/instagram-cloudinary/): Pulls Instagram posts and uploads images to Cloudinary with tags (TypeScript, Cloudinary)
- [Emotional Recipes](https://emotional-recipes.com/): Tool to navigate difficult emotions and return to calm (React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Next.js, Cloudinary)
- [PDX Food Weeks](https://pdx-food-weeks.vercel.app/): Annual celebration of Portland food weeks (React, TypeScript, Panda CSS, Next.js)
- [BoochTown](https://boochtown.com/): Kombucha reviews and ratings (SvelteKit, TypeScript, Panda CSS, Cloudinary)
- [Zine Viewer](https://joelmturner.com/illustration/zines/): Web component for flipbook-style zine viewing (TypeScript)

### Flagship writing

#### Cloudinary and media

- [Retrieving Instagram Content with Cloudinary — DevJams #17](https://joelmturner.com/blog/cloudinary-devjams-episode-17/): Guest episode on Instagram-to-Cloudinary automation and Jamstack gallery work
- [Delivering Video with Cloudinary & Exploring Astro — DevJams #36](https://joelmturner.com/blog/cloudinary-devjams-episode-36/): Guest episode on Astro migration, Cloudinary video transforms, and portfolio walkthrough
- [Instagram to Cloudinary](https://joelmturner.com/blog/instagram-cloudinary/): GitHub Action to sync Instagram posts to Cloudinary and trigger Netlify builds

#### Astro and this site

- [Why I Migrated from Next.js to Astro](https://joelmturner.com/blog/nextjs-astro/): Site migration notes — Svelte islands, Panda CSS, simpler stack
- [Astro Font Loading: Optimizing Performance with astro-font](https://joelmturner.com/blog/astro-font-optimization/): Font preload, font-display, and reducing CLS
- [Font loading in Astro](https://joelmturner.com/blog/astro-font-loading/): Additional font-loading patterns for this site

#### Data visualization

- [Chart Parts: Dimensions, Metrics, and What Makes Up a Chart](https://joelmturner.com/blog/chart-parts-anatomy-of-a-chart/): Intro to chart anatomy — dimensions, metrics, axes, and controls
- [Data Vis React Bar Chart with vx](https://joelmturner.com/blog/data-vis-react-bar-chart-vx/): Building a bar chart with @vx
- [Working on a New Feature as a Senior Frontend Developer](https://joelmturner.com/blog/working-feature-senior-frontend-developer/): Scoping, patterns, and shipping features as a senior engineer

#### React patterns

- [React One Time Password Input Component](https://joelmturner.com/blog/react-one-time-password-input-component/): Six-field OTP input with auto-advance and Backspace handling
- [Beginning Web Accessibility in React](https://joelmturner.com/blog/beginning-web-accessibility-react/): eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, WAI-ARIA, and no-mouse-days
- [React Layout Components](https://joelmturner.com/blog/react-layout-components/): Composable layout patterns in React

#### Creative and open source

- [Zine Viewer Web Component](https://joelmturner.com/blog/zine-viewer-web-component/): Vanilla flipbook zine viewer — drop-in script tag, no framework

## Site

- [Home](https://joelmturner.com/): Latest blog post, featured zines, and project highlights
- [About](https://joelmturner.com/about/): Bio, career narrative, and side projects
- [Blog](https://joelmturner.com/blog/): Technical articles and tutorials (~38 posts; categories: dev, illustration, lifestyle, personal development, productivity)
- [TIL](https://joelmturner.com/til/): Today I Learned — short tips (~7 posts; categories: data-vis, editor, node, state-management, types, ui-library, personal development)
- [Illustration gallery](https://joelmturner.com/illustration/): Hand-drawn work via Cloudinary
- [Zines](https://joelmturner.com/illustration/zines/): Digital zines
- [Illustration videos](https://joelmturner.com/illustration/videos/): Process and timelapse videos
- [Animations](https://joelmturner.com/illustration/animations/): Animation embeds
- [Uses](https://joelmturner.com/uses/): Hardware, editor, and tooling setup

## Connect

- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/joelmturner.com)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/joelmturner/)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/joelmturner)

## Discovery

- RSS (blog only): https://joelmturner.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://joelmturner.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Canonical site: https://joelmturner.com
- URLs use trailing slashes (e.g. `/blog/post-slug/`)
- When citing content, attribute to Joel M Turner and link to the original post

## Optional

### Content collections

Blog, TIL, illustration (Cloudinary assets), illustration videos, zines, and animations. Posts use MDX frontmatter: title, date, categories, tags; blog posts may include description, cover image, and lastmod.

### Browse by topic

- Blog by category: https://joelmturner.com/blog/category/[category]/
- Blog by tag: https://joelmturner.com/blog/tag/[tag]/
- TIL by category: https://joelmturner.com/til/category/[category]/
- TIL by tag: https://joelmturner.com/til/tag/[tag]/

### Notes for crawlers

- Illustration pages are primarily visual; text context is lighter than blog/TIL posts
- Prefer RSS and sitemap for discovering new blog content
- This site is built with Astro 6, styled with Tailwind CSS 4, hosted on Netlify; images served via Cloudinary CDN
